title: Summer Batch 2026 Starting Soon
content: Summer batches for Classes 8-12 will commence from 1st April 2026. Early bird registrations are now open with special discounts.

title: Board Exam Schedule 2026 Released
content: Class 10 and 12 board exam schedules have been released. Download your timetable from the notice board.

title: PTM Schedule for March 2026
content: Parent-Teacher Meeting scheduled for 20th March 2026. All parents are requested to attend.

title: Scholarship Test Results
content: Scholarship test results for academic year 2026-27 have been declared. Check the results section for details.

title: Winter Break Schedule
content: Institute will remain closed from 25th December 2025 to 5th January 2026 for winter break.
